# Bright Tech Solutions

Bright Tech Solutions is a trusted IT partner located in Horamavu Agara, Bengaluru. We specialize in professional computer repairs, certified refurbished laptops, and premium desktop sales.

## Contact Information
- **Address:** Renukamma. No 17/1 Horamavu Agara, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560043
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +91 62076 88566
- **Business Hours:** Open 24/7 (Available 24 Hours)

## Core Services & Links

- **Home:** [https://brighttechsolution.store/](https://brighttechsolution.store/)
  General information about our computer repair and sales services.

- **Repairs:** [https://brighttechsolution.store/repairs.html](https://brighttechsolution.store/repairs.html)
  Expert technicians for Apple MacBooks, Premium Laptops, and Custom Desktops. Services include:
  - Apple MacBook Repair (Logic board, screen, battery)
  - Hardware Upgrades (SSD, RAM, Graphics Cards)
  - Data Recovery (Hard drive failure, SSD retrieval)
  - OS & Software Support (Windows/macOS install, virus removal)

- **Sales:** [https://brighttechsolution.store/sales.html](https://brighttechsolution.store/sales.html)
  Shop deals on new and refurbished laptops and custom-built desktops.
  - Refurbished Laptops (Dell, HP, Lenovo, Apple) starting from ₹18,999
  - Custom Built Gaming & Workstation Desktops
  - Brand New Laptops from leading brands

- **Contact & Location:** [https://brighttechsolution.store/contact.html](https://brighttechsolution.store/contact.html)
  Map, directions, and ways to get in touch.

## Business Promise
"If we can't fix it, no one can." With over 10 years of experience in the Bengaluru tech market, our technicians handle the most complex board-level issues that other service centers turn away.
